news.title:
IPO lock-in expirations starting April 15 unlock Rs 5L crore in shares across firms like Tata Capital, Meesho, LG India, and Pine Labs.
Nuvama report highlights 81 firms unlocking shares by July 2026, with major market players seeing significant share eligibility changes.
news.summary:
IPO lock-in expirations starting April 15 unlock Rs 5L crore in shares across firms like Tata Capital, Meesho, LG India, and Pine Labs.
Nuvama report highlights 81 firms unlocking shares by July 2026, with major market players seeing significant share eligibility changes.

news.title:
Weak rupee, West Asia conflict raise input costs, prompting price hikes by appliance makers like LG, Voltas.
AC prices rose 10-15%, other appliances up 5%. FMCG firms face 15-20% input inflation, broader hikes possible.
news.summary:
Weak rupee, West Asia conflict raise input costs, prompting price hikes by appliance makers like LG, Voltas.
AC prices rose 10-15%, other appliances up 5%. FMCG firms face 15-20% input inflation, broader hikes possible.

news.title:
LG Electronics faces Rs. 7.98 Cr tax demand for FY 2019-20 over input tax credit on employee transport.
Tax includes Rs. 2.53 Cr principal, Rs. 2.53 Cr penalty, Rs. 2.92 Cr interest; appeal to be filed, no operational impact.
news.summary:
LG Electronics faces Rs. 7.98 Cr tax demand for FY 2019-20 over input tax credit on employee transport.
Tax includes Rs. 2.53 Cr principal, Rs. 2.53 Cr penalty, Rs. 2.92 Cr interest; appeal to be filed, no operational impact.

news.title:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.
news.summary:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.

news.title:
LG Electronics India Q3FY26 revenue at 41.14B vs 43.96B LY; EBITDA 1.96B, margin 4.8%.
Market share gains: washing machines 33%, refrigerators 30%. Govt incentive 705Cr, new plant construction progressing.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India Q3FY26 revenue at 41.14B vs 43.96B LY; EBITDA 1.96B, margin 4.8%.
Market share gains: washing machines 33%, refrigerators 30%. Govt incentive 705Cr, new plant construction progressing.

news.title:
Consumer firms like Dabur, Emami pivot to lower-priced packs amid rural recovery.
GST rate cut and rural demand push entry-level offerings for volume growth.
news.summary:
Consumer firms like Dabur, Emami pivot to lower-priced packs amid rural recovery.
GST rate cut and rural demand push entry-level offerings for volume growth.

news.title:
LG Electronics India shared a link to the audio recording of its Q3 FY2025 earnings call.
The recording is accessible on its website and pertains to unaudited financial results.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India shared a link to the audio recording of its Q3 FY2025 earnings call.
The recording is accessible on its website and pertains to unaudited financial results.

news.title:
LG Electronics India plans Rs.5,000 crore investment to enhance exports.
New AC production is expected to commence by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India plans Rs.5,000 crore investment to enhance exports.
New AC production is expected to commence by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
LG Electronics posted Q3 net profit of 897M INR, down from 2.3B INR YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 41B INR compared to 44B INR YoY.
news.summary:
LG Electronics posted Q3 net profit of 897M INR, down from 2.3B INR YoY.
Q3 revenue declined to 41B INR compared to 44B INR YoY.

news.title:
LG Electronics India faces a customs duty demand of ₹10.63 crore, reduced to ₹79.5 lakh post voluntary payment.
Additional ₹79.5 lakh penalty and ₹30 lakh fine imposed; company plans to appeal with no operational impact expected.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India faces a customs duty demand of ₹10.63 crore, reduced to ₹79.5 lakh post voluntary payment.
Additional ₹79.5 lakh penalty and ₹30 lakh fine imposed; company plans to appeal with no operational impact expected.

news.title:
LG Electronics India will host an earnings call on Feb 12, 2026, at 4 PM IST to discuss Q3FY26 results.
Management, including CFO and Investor Relations, will present insights, followed by a Q&A session.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India will host an earnings call on Feb 12, 2026, at 4 PM IST to discuss Q3FY26 results.
Management, including CFO and Investor Relations, will present insights, followed by a Q&A session.

news.title:
LG Electronics India clarifies no customs duty demand of ₹11.91 cr raised.
Company ensures accurate info for stakeholders, complying with SEBI norms.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India clarifies no customs duty demand of ₹11.91 cr raised.
Company ensures accurate info for stakeholders, complying with SEBI norms.

news.title: LG Electronics India denies demand of INR 119.2M differential duty.
news.summary: LG Electronics India denies demand of INR 119.2M differential duty.

news.title:
Customs authority demands Rs 11.9 crore duty plus interest and penalty from LG Electronics India.
LG Electronics plans to appeal, citing strong legal cases; no material financial impact expected.
news.summary:
Customs authority demands Rs 11.9 crore duty plus interest and penalty from LG Electronics India.
LG Electronics plans to appeal, citing strong legal cases; no material financial impact expected.

news.title:
Maharashtra approved ₹705.7 crore incentives for LG Electronics India.
The incentives support LG Electronics India's expansion plans until 2040.
news.summary:
Maharashtra approved ₹705.7 crore incentives for LG Electronics India.
The incentives support LG Electronics India's expansion plans until 2040.

news.title:
LG Electronics India reappoints Mr. Dongmyung Seo as Whole-Time Director for 4 years from Jan 27, 2026.
Mr. Jongha Hwang appointed as Chief Strategy Officer effective Jan 16, 2026, with extensive strategic experience.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India reappoints Mr. Dongmyung Seo as Whole-Time Director for 4 years from Jan 27, 2026.
Mr. Jongha Hwang appointed as Chief Strategy Officer effective Jan 16, 2026, with extensive strategic experience.

news.title:
LG Electronics India signs pricing agreement with CBDT, cutting contingent liabilities to zero.
The company will pay ₹38.6M to LG Electronics Inc; ₹3.15B royalty contingency removed.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India signs pricing agreement with CBDT, cutting contingent liabilities to zero.
The company will pay ₹38.6M to LG Electronics Inc; ₹3.15B royalty contingency removed.

news.title:
LG Electronics India signed APA with Indian tax authorities for 2014-23.
Contingent liabilities of ₹1,724M & ₹3,153M become nil; tax expense at ₹177M.
news.summary:
LG Electronics India signed APA with Indian tax authorities for 2014-23.
Contingent liabilities of ₹1,724M & ₹3,153M become nil; tax expense at ₹177M.

news.title:
IPO lock-in expiries from Dec 2025 to Mar 2026 may release $24-26B in shares.
Nuvama suggests monitoring January 2026 expiries as they may impact stock prices.
news.summary:
IPO lock-in expiries from Dec 2025 to Mar 2026 may release $24-26B in shares.
Nuvama suggests monitoring January 2026 expiries as they may impact stock prices.

news.title:
Sri City secures ₹20,250 crore investments via 43 MoUs by 2025.
₹11,750 crore was secured at CII Partnership Summit in Visakhapatnam.
news.summary:
Sri City secures ₹20,250 crore investments via 43 MoUs by 2025.
